versions.version_description: Complete version of the song in Bbm.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Ab6[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]  [ch]Gb[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab] [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Like a movie scene[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ab[/ch]
In the sweetest dreams[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Gb[/ch]
I have pictured us together[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Now to feel your lips[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ab[/ch]
On my fingertips[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Gb[/ch]
I have to say is even better[/tab]

[tab]   [ch]Bbm[/ch]                         [ch]Ab[/ch]
Then I ever thought it could possibly be[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fm[/ch]                                        [ch]Gb[/ch]
It's perfect, it's passion, it's setting me free[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Bbm[/ch]
From all of my sadness[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Ab[/ch]
The tears that I've cried[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Gb[/ch]
I have spent all of my life[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Waiting for tonight, oh[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Fm[/ch]                      [ch]Gb[/ch]
When you would be here in my arms[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]
Waiting for tonight, oh[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fm[/ch]                       [ch]Gb[/ch]
I've dreamed of this love for so long[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Gb[/ch]
Waiting for tonight  oh       oh        oh[/tab]

[tab]([ch]Bbm[/ch]      [ch]Ab[/ch]       [ch]Fm[/ch]        [ch]Gb[/ch]) continues...
Tender words you say[/tab]
Take my breath away
Love me now, leave me never
Found a sacred place
Lost in your embrace
I want to stay in this forever
I think of the days when the sun used to set
On my empty heart, all alone in my bed
Tossing and turning 
Emotions were strong
I knew I had to hold on

Chorus (x2)

Gone are the days when the sun used to set
On my empty heart all alone in my bed
Tossing and turning Emotions were strong I knew I had to hold on
